inline_comments.message:
- I do not believe this is a good use case for using builder pattern.
- We are not supporting multiple representations of PartialPropAndEdgeLoader object.
- I believe the method parameters are all mandatory 
- The builder is just using a bunch of setter methods 
- What is the sonar issue that we are trying to resolve here?

The Sonar issue which is addressed here is : https://sonar.onap.org/code?id=org.onap.aai.graphadmin%3Aaai-graphadmin&selected=org.onap.aai.graphadmin%3Aaai-graphadmin%3Asrc%2Fmain%2Fjava%2Forg%2Fonap%2Faai%2Fdatasnapshot%2FPartialPropAndEdgeLoader.java

"Constructor has 8 parameters, which is greater than 7 authorized."
